item.title: CameronCandau.com/CTF
item.description: This is where I publish write-ups for Capture the Flag challenges, including OSCP preparation.

item.title: OSCP
item.description: Timeline 2025-08-06: Bought exam + lab access 2025-08-29: Completed at least 30 boxes from the TJnull/Lain lists 2025-08-30: Started PWK course and lab access 2025-10-17 to 2025-11-11: Completed PWK Challenge Labs Additional Proving Grounds boxes DVR4 Image Lavita Shenzi PC Fired Press Scrutiny Ruby...

item.title: OffSec Proving Grounds Tracking for OSCP

item.title: Heist
item.description: System Information OS: Windows Service Discovery Helper scripts source: github.com/CameronCandau/Pentest-Automation scan --autorecon 8080/tcp HTTP Summary : Bootstrap[3.3.6], HTML5, HTTPServer[Werkzeug/2.0.1 Python/3.9.0], JQuery[2.2.2], Python[3.9.0], Script, Werkzeug[2.0.1] “Super Secure Web Brows...

item.title: Access
item.description: System Information OS: Windows Architecture: x86 Service Discovery Helper scripts source: github.com/CameronCandau/Pentest-Automation new-target access 192.168.228.187 cd ~/oscp/access scan.sh --autorecon 80/tcp HTTP feroxbuster points out /Ticket.php: We see that the “Buy Tickets” form submits to /...

item.title: Vault
item.description: Difficulty: Hard Credentials Guest: vault.offsec\anirudh:SecureHM Service Discovery Open Ports & Priority TCP Ports: 53 139 445 389 88 135 464 593 636 3268 3269 3389 5985 9389 49666 49667 49673 49674 49679 49703 Service Enumeration 3389 FQDN: DC.vault.offsec 53 AXFR failed, no useful info withou...

item.title: Squid
item.description: Difficulty: Easy Squid Notes & Methodology Start Here: Service Discovery This includes my mistakes, reasoning, and rabbit holes — it’s not the most direct way to solve the box! Findings Vulnerabilities and Suggested Remediation The open Squid http proxy allows anyone to enumerate the internal WA...

item.title: 3128 HTTP
item.description: HyperText Transport Protocol Environment Variables / Setup export IP=192.168.159.189 export PORT=3128 export URL=http://$IP:$PORT Phase 1: Initial Reconnaissance Technology Stack Identification whatweb whatweb $URL p://192.168.159.189:3128 [400 Bad Request] Content-Language[en], Country[RESERVED][ZZ...

item.title: Service Discovery
item.description: Initial Setup & Information Gathering Host Information Target IP:192.168.159.189 Operating System:Windows 2016 x64 Domain/Hostname:Squid Difficulty: Easy Environment Variables / Setup export IP=192.168.159.189 mkdir $IP && cd $IP mkdir {nmap,web,smb,ftp,exploit,loot} Phase 1: Port Discov...

item.title: Slort
item.description: Difficulty: Intermediate Service Enumeration For a more detailed scan of default ports: nmap $ip -oN default_ver_script.nmap -sV -sC PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 21/tcp open ftp FileZilla ftpd 0.9.41 beta | ftp-syst: |_ SYST: UNIX emulated by FileZilla 135/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC 139/tcp ...
